# Eval Case Template

Use this template for `docs/evals/engineer-harness/cases/*.md`.

title: Short case title
priority: P1
category: routing | hitl | delegation | primitive-boundary | verification | safety
---

```text
[The exact user prompt to evaluate.]
```

- Primary route:
- Secondary route, if any:
- Must not route to:

## Expected Behavior

- Context discipline:
- Delegation:
- Human approval:
- Verification:
- Safety:
- Output usability:

## Scoring Notes

- Full credit:
- Partial credit:
- Fail:
